phases.name: PES C3 Enforcement (US-014)
phases.description: Four new PES rule evaluators and state schema v2.0.0 extension for Waves 5-9 enforcement.

steps.name: PES C3 rule evaluators and state schema extension
steps.description: PDC gate, deadline blocking, submission immutability, corpus integrity evaluators. State schema v2.0.0 with C3 fields. Engine dispatch for new rule types. PES config extension.
criteria: PDC gate blocks Wave 5 when sections have RED Tier 1/2 PDC items
Deadline blocking warns at critical threshold and blocks non-essential waves
Submission immutability blocks writes to submitted artifacts; allows reads
Corpus integrity blocks modification of win/loss tags; allows appending new tags
All four rules configurable in pes-config.json; C1 invariants unaffected
steps.implementation_notes: Follow WaveOrderingEvaluator pattern: each evaluator is a separate domain class. Engine dispatches by rule_type. State schema v2.0.0 forward-compatible with v1.0.0 (missing fields default to null). Scenarios: pes_enforcement_c3.feature (10 scenarios) + walking_skeleton_c3.feature skeleton 8.

phases.name: Visual Assets (US-010)
phases.description: Figure inventory, generation lifecycle, cross-reference validation with PES PDC gate integration.

steps.name: Visual asset domain models and port
steps.description: FigurePlaceholder, FigureInventory, GeneratedFigure, CrossReferenceLog domain models. VisualAssetPort interface. FileVisualAssetAdapter.
criteria: Figure placeholders extracted from outline with type and generation method
Figure inventory created with all placeholders and written to artifacts
Cross-reference log validates figure-to-text consistency
steps.implementation_notes: Frozen dataclasses matching SectionDraft pattern. VisualAssetPort abstracts generation method. Scenarios: visual_assets.feature (inventory, cross-ref models).

steps.name: Visual asset generation and review lifecycle
steps.description: VisualAssetService orchestrates generation per method, human review checkpoint per figure, cross-reference validation, manual replacement support.
criteria: Mermaid diagrams generate SVG output to figures directory
Non-generatable figures produce external brief with dimensions and resolution
Each figure presented for human review with approve/revise/replace options
Cross-reference validation catches orphaned references and missing figures
PES PDC gate enforced before Wave 5 entry
steps.implementation_notes: Generation method routed by FigurePlaceholder.generation_method. Adapter writes to ./artifacts/wave-5-visuals/figures/. Scenarios: visual_assets.feature (generation, review, PES gate) + walking_skeleton_c3.feature skeleton 6 (partial).

phases.name: Formatting and Assembly (US-011)
phases.description: Template-based formatting, jargon audit, page count verification, volume assembly with compliance final check.

steps.name: Format template port and agency templates
steps.description: FormatTemplatePort, DocumentAssemblyPort interfaces. JsonFormatTemplateAdapter. Agency format templates (DoD, NASA, NSF, DOE) as JSON data files.
criteria: Format templates loaded by agency and solicitation type
Templates specify font, margins, headers, footers, page limits
New agency templates added by creating JSON file, no code changes
steps.implementation_notes: Port interface returns FormatTemplate domain object. Templates in templates/format-rules/. Scenario: formatting_assembly.feature (template loading).

steps.name: Document formatting, figure insertion, and jargon audit
steps.description: FormattingService applies template rules, inserts figures, formats references. Jargon audit flags undefined acronyms. Page count verification against solicitation limit.
criteria: Formatted document matches solicitation font, margins, headers
Figures inserted at correct positions with captions; references formatted consistently
Jargon audit flags undefined acronyms with locations
Page count verified: within limit reported, over limit shows largest sections and trimming guidance
steps.implementation_notes: python-docx adapter for Word output. FormattingService delegates to DocumentAssemblyPort. Scenarios: formatting_assembly.feature (formatting, jargon, page count -- 5 scenarios).

steps.name: Volume assembly and compliance final check
steps.description: AssemblyService assembles sections into volumes per solicitation structure. Final compliance matrix check. Human checkpoint for assembled package.
criteria: Volumes assembled into required file structure in assembly artifacts directory
Compliance matrix final check reports covered/waived/missing counts
Missing compliance items block progression with guidance
Human checkpoint presented at assembled package review
steps.implementation_notes: Assembled volumes written to ./artifacts/wave-6-format/assembled/. Compliance check reads living matrix from Wave 1. Scenarios: formatting_assembly.feature (assembly, compliance, checkpoint -- 3 scenarios) + walking_skeleton_c3.feature skeleton 6 (partial).

phases.name: Final Review (US-012)
phases.description: Reviewer persona simulation, red team review, debrief cross-check, iteration loop, and sign-off gate.

steps.name: Final review domain models and service
steps.description: ReviewerScorecard, RedTeamFinding, DebriefCrossCheckEntry, SignOffRecord models. FinalReviewService with reviewer simulation, red team, debrief cross-check, and iteration loop (max 2).
criteria: Reviewer persona simulation scores against evaluation criteria with rationale
Red team identifies objections tagged by severity referencing section and page
Debrief cross-check flags known weaknesses from corpus
Handles gracefully when no past debriefs exist
Issue resolution loop supports max 2 iterations
steps.implementation_notes: FinalReviewService tracks review_round and delegates LLM review to agent. Scorecard and findings written to ./artifacts/wave-7-review/. Scenarios: final_review.feature (simulation, red team, debrief cross-check, no debriefs, iteration -- 5 scenarios).

steps.name: Review sign-off and Wave 8 gate
steps.description: Human sign-off checkpoint. After 2 iterations, forced sign-off with unresolved items documented. Sign-off gates Wave 8 via PES wave ordering extension.
criteria: Human sign-off required before submission; recorded with timestamp
After 2 review iterations, sign-off required with unresolved items documented
Sign-off record written to review artifacts directory
PES blocks Wave 8 without sign-off
steps.implementation_notes: Sign-off status stored in proposal-state.json#final_review. PES wave ordering evaluator extended for Wave 7->8 gate. Scenarios: final_review.feature (forced sign-off, sign-off unlocks Wave 8 -- 2 scenarios) + walking_skeleton_c3.feature skeleton 7 (partial).

phases.name: Submission (US-013)
phases.description: Portal identification, packaging rules, pre-submission verification, confirmation capture, immutable archive.

steps.name: Portal rules port and submission packaging
steps.description: PortalRulesPort interface. JsonPortalRulesAdapter. Portal rule templates (DSIP, Grants.gov, NSPIRES). SubmissionService applies portal-specific file naming, size limits, format requirements.
criteria: Portal identified from agency in proposal state
Portal-specific file naming applied to all package files
File sizes verified against portal limits
Missing required files block submission with actionable guidance
steps.implementation_notes: Portal rules in templates/portal-rules/ as JSON data files, editable by Phil for inter-cycle changes. Scenarios: submission.feature (portal ID, packaging, missing files, sign-off gate -- 4 scenarios).

steps.name: Submission confirmation, immutable archive, and read-only enforcement
steps.description: Human confirmation checkpoint. Manual confirmation number entry. Immutable archive creation. PES marks artifacts read-only via submission immutability evaluator.
criteria: Submission requires explicit human confirmation
Confirmation number manually entered; timestamp captured
Immutable archive created in submission archive directory
PES blocks all modifications to submitted artifacts
PES blocks modification after submission with clear message
steps.implementation_notes: submission.immutable flag triggers PES immutability evaluator. Archive is directory copy of assembled volumes + package. Scenarios: submission.feature (confirmation, archive, post-submission block -- 3 scenarios) + walking_skeleton_c3.feature skeleton 7 (partial).

steps.name: Status service extension for C3 waves
steps.description: Extend StatusService to report Wave 5-9 progress, deadline warnings, and submission status in /proposal status output.
criteria: Status reports Wave 5-9 progress with completion percentages
Deadline warnings surface in status output at critical threshold
Submitted proposals show confirmation number, archive path, and read-only status
steps.implementation_notes: Extends existing StatusService with C3 wave status fields. Integrates with deadline blocking evaluator for warning display.

phases.name: Debrief Request Letter (US-016)
phases.description: Agency-specific debrief request letter generation from templates with skip option.

steps.name: Outcome recording and debrief request letter generation
steps.description: OutcomeService records win/loss outcome. Generates agency-specific debrief request letter from templates (DoD FAR 15.505, NASA). Skipping is valid.
criteria: Letter references topic number, confirmation, and applicable regulations
Letter adapts to agency (DoD FAR 15.505 vs NASA vs other)
Skipping debrief request recorded without creating a letter
Letter written to learning artifacts directory
steps.implementation_notes: Letter templates in templates/debrief-request/. Outcome recorded in proposal-state.json#learning. Scenarios: debrief_request.feature (DoD letter, NASA letter, skip -- 3 scenarios).

steps.name: Awarded proposal archiving with outcome tags
steps.description: OutcomeService archives awarded proposals with outcome tags. Extracts winning discriminators for pattern analysis.
criteria: Awarded proposals archived with outcome tag and discriminators extracted
Win/loss tags are append-only (PES corpus integrity enforced)
Outcome without debrief is valid terminal state
steps.implementation_notes: Corpus integrity PES rule enforces append-only tags. Scenarios: debrief_ingestion.feature (awarded outcome, outcome without debrief -- 2 scenarios).

phases.name: Debrief Ingestion and Learning (US-015)
phases.description: Debrief parsing, critique-to-section mapping, win/loss pattern analysis, lessons learned.

steps.name: Debrief parsing and critique-to-section mapping
steps.description: DebriefParserPort interface. TextDebriefParserAdapter. DebriefService parses feedback, maps critiques to sections, flags known weaknesses. Freeform fallback for unstructured debriefs.
criteria: Debrief parsed from PDF or text file with parsing confidence reported
Each critique mapped to proposal section and page
Known weaknesses from past debriefs flagged when matching critiques found
Unstructured debriefs preserved as freeform text
Structured debrief and critique map written to learning artifacts directory
steps.implementation_notes: LLM agent does parsing; domain service validates output. Critique mapping uses section numbering from submitted outline. Scenarios: debrief_ingestion.feature (parse, map, unstructured -- 3 scenarios).

steps.name: Win/loss pattern analysis, corpus update, and lessons learned
steps.description: OutcomeService updates cumulative pattern analysis across corpus. Corpus librarian updates win/loss tags (append-only). Lessons learned with human checkpoint.
criteria: Win/loss pattern analysis updates cumulatively with confidence level noted
Win/loss tags are append-only (PES-enforced)
Lessons learned reviewed by human before corpus update completes
Pattern analysis written to learning artifacts directory
steps.implementation_notes: Corpus integrity PES rule enforces append-only tags. Pattern analysis notes confidence level with small corpus. Scenarios: debrief_ingestion.feature (patterns, outcomes, lessons -- 3 scenarios) + walking_skeleton_c3.feature skeleton 7 (partial).
